evals.prompt: I'm building a new skill for ADHD executive function support — it should help with task prioritization, time blindness compensation, and working memory scaffolding. I need it to work across Claude, OpenAI, n8n, and as an MCP server. Can you scaffold the full project with the build system?
evals.expected_output: A complete project scaffold: source/manifest.json with metadata wrapper and JSON Schema parameters, build.ts generating all 6 formats, package.json with per-format scripts, and source markdown stubs.

evals.prompt: I have an existing dyscalculia-support-skill project. Its manifest uses the older flat format with CommandParameter arrays. I want to migrate it to the standardized manifest schema and regenerate the build.ts.
evals.expected_output: Migration of flat manifest to metadata-wrapper + JSON Schema parameters. New domain-agnostic build.ts. All 6 formats build.

evals.prompt: I've got a tarot card reading interpretation skill. It has commands for single-card pulls, three-card spreads, Celtic Cross readings, and card-of-the-day. Generate the multi-format build system for it.
evals.expected_output: Complete build system for a non-educational domain. build.ts must be domain-agnostic. Manifest with metadata, skills, and commands with JSON Schema parameters.

iteration_1.eval_2_dyscalculia: 9/10 — domain term leaked into CLI section of build.ts
iteration_1.eval_3_tarot: 9/10 — domain term leaked into CLI section of build.ts
iteration_1.fix_applied: Strengthened SKILL.md and build-template.md with explicit domain-agnostic guidance for CLI generator
